englishDefinitions: To move or act quickly and in a disorganized way in order to do something or escape.
To struggle urgently to get or prepare something.
persianTranslation: با عجله و به‌هم‌ریخته عمل کردن
به‌زحمت و با شتاب آماده کردن
examples: We had to scramble to finish the project on time.
The crew scrambled to find a replacement camera truck.
He scrambled up the hill in the dark.
